finding_results.notes: Reworked Anika's confrontation lines from abstract framing to concrete, child-scale objects/actions (letter, form, backpack, lunch money/school forms/PT sheets), while increasing pressure-true contractions and preserving conflict leverage.

summary: Addressed the dialogue idiolect drift finding by tightening Anika's pressured speech into age-true, concrete register with higher contraction density and clearer voice separation from Ravi.
